name: m_conversation_topic_switch_winback_detour
notes: Topic-switch-then-return around a REAL delegated task (not a flow beat): the owner asks for a win-back plan (Sales-Recovery delegation), detours into an unrelated FAQ, then returns asking for the STATUS of the same campaign. Distinct from the existing topic_switch_and_return.json (which detours around the integration-readiness flow beat with no seeded data) — this exercises new_task delegation + task_status classification surviving a detour. Setup: `setup --onboarded --seed-lapsed-customers 8 --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> m_conversation_topic_switch_winback_detour.json`.

steps.message: please draft a winback campaign for my customers who haven't ordered in a while
steps.note: New-task ask. Expect delegation to Sales-Recovery (plan summary + approval) OR an honest insufficient-cohort reply — either way, never silent, never D1.

steps.message: hold on — quick question, does Viabe work on both Android and iPhone?
steps.note: Unrelated FAQ detour mid-task. Expect a real answer without dropping the pending campaign thread.

steps.message: ok cool, so what's happening with that customer campaign then?
assert_not_contains: what campaign are you referring to
steps.note: Return-and-resume via a task_status ask. Must report on the SAME winback item from turn 1 — never lose track or ask which campaign is meant.
